name: Social Marketing Full Implementation
description: Complete Social Marketing implementation workflow: analyze requirements, connect accounts, configure campaigns, schedule posts, validate, and monitor.

steps.name: Analyze Requirements
steps.description: Analyze social marketing requirements: platforms, accounts, campaigns, posting cadence, and team permissions

steps.name: Connect Social Accounts
steps.description: Connect Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, X/Twitter, and YouTube accounts and pages

steps.name: Configure UTM Campaigns
steps.description: Create or map utm.campaign records and configure source/medium attribution for social traffic

steps.name: Create and Schedule Content
steps.description: Create social.post records with message, media, campaign links, and scheduled_date

steps.name: Setup Stream Monitoring
steps.description: Configure social.stream records for mentions, hashtags, and page monitoring

steps.name: Validate Scheduled Posts
steps.description: Validate scheduled posts for platform constraints, media, and scheduled_date before publication

steps.name: Review Analytics
steps.description: Review social.live.post engagement metrics and campaign performance after posts are published
